stemHtml: During radio communication failure, an aircraft forming part of the aerodrome traffic at a controlled aerodrome, shall amongst other requirements…

options.a: land without delay and vacate the runway and report the termination of the flight.
options.b: leave the aerodrome traffic and divert to the next suitable aerodrome.
options.c: keep a watch for such instructions as may be issued by visual signals.
options.d: watch such instructions as may be issued by other aircraft of the aerodrome traffic.
